sections.label: Lyrics
lines: [Intro, Haunting Synths, Distant Echoes]
Winds whisper over burning sand,
Footsteps swallowed by the shifting land.
[Verse 1, Ethereal Ambience]
A hand of stone, a shackle tight,
Dreams of freedom buried in the night.
The river roared, the blood ran deep,
A voice cried out from the dust and heat.
[Pre-Chorus, Layered Vocals, Rising Strings]
A shadow fell, a curse undone,
The sea divides beneath the sun.
Through parted waves, through whispered breath,
We walked between the hands of death.
[Chorus, Swelling Strings, Melancholic Guitars]
Beyond the waters, past the flame,
We march through sorrow, call His name.
The sky is open, the ground is dry,
The promised dawn burns in our eyes.
[Verse 2, Haunting Synths, Minimal Percussion]
A desert vast, the hunger sways,
Manna falls like ghostly praise.
The voice still speaks in fire and cloud,
A law of light to shape the sound.
[Verse 3, Melancholy Guitars, Echoing Vocals]
The weary cried, "Turn back again!
Was slavery not better than the wind?"
Their hearts grew cold, their voices strained,
But some held on, endured the pain.
[Pre-Chorus, Layered Vocals, Rising Strings]
A shadow fell, a curse undone,
The sea divides beneath the sun.
Through parted waves, through whispered breath,
We walked between the hands of death.
[Chorus, Swelling Strings, Melancholic Guitars]
Beyond the waters, past the flame,
We march through sorrow, call His name.
The sky is open, the ground is dry,
The promised dawn burns in our eyes.
[Verse 4, Melancholic Tones, Sparse Percussion]
A golden calf, a shattered stone,
The path was lost, we stood alone.
Yet through the dust, the water poured,
A voice still called, a promise swore.
[Verse 5, Haunting Strings, Ethereal Ambience]
The walls stood tall, the trumpets cried,
A city fell, the past untied.
Through battle scars and broken ground,
The land of promise wrapped us round.
[Bridge, Breakdown, Echoing Vocals]
The wandering fades, the night resigns,
The morning climbs the hills in fire.
Yet even dust will taste the rain,
A promised land beyond the pain.
[Instrumental, Swelling Strings, Ethereal Soundscape]
[Finale, Big Finish, Layered Vocals]
Beyond the waters, past the flame,
We march through sorrow, call His name.
The sky is open, the ground is dry,
The promised dawn burns in our eyes.
